game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Utility for SteamVR for keeping track of FPS, frame time and other performance metrics in the in-game overlay. Easily change SteamVR settings in the fpsVR settings overlay in the SteamVR dashboard. Headset cable twist tracking and other useful features.

Supported VR headsets and APIs

About supported headsets and APIs see forum topic "fpsVR Q&A"

Please read before buying!


About the Software

Utility for SteamVR for keeping track of FPS, frame time and other performance metrics in the in-game overlay. Easily change SteamVR settings in the fpsVR settings overlay in the SteamVR dashboard. Headset cable twist tracking and other useful features.

Features include:

  • Display of the current FPS and the average FPS for VR session

  • Display of the GPU & CPU usage (and Max CPU/Thread Usage - the maximum instantaneous usage among all threads/cores in the system)

  • Display of the GPU MEM & RAM usage

  • Display of the GPU & CPU frametimes

  • Display of the GPU temperature and CPU temperature (Experimental feature)

  • Display of the Ratio of reprojected frames to presented frames, Display of the number of dropped frames

  • Display of the current time and duration of the VR session

  • Display the batteries charge of the controllers (and Vive trackers) in percentages.

  • Ability to set default playback and record devices, ability to mute/unmute the microphone using VR headset proximity sensor, ability to change Steam VR audio settings

  • SteamVR Supersampling settings & Motion Smoothing settings

  • Сable tracking feature.

  • Display the status of the microphone, microphone control: mute / unmute

  • Ability to change the size and the opacity of the overlay window, Ability to attach the overlay window to the controllers, Ability to hide the overlay window

  • Center marker - displays a marker that represents the center of the playspace.

  • Ability to attach the overlay window for seated positions in seated games/apps (for auto/flight-sims)

  • Automatically start fpsVR when SteamVR starts (optional), Automatically minimize the window after start (optional)

  • Hide the window to Windows tray in minimized state (optional)

  • Ability to reset statistics at any time for benchmarking/testing

  • Ability to save the history of VR sessions and view it in the fpsVR History Viewer (included)

  • Timer, Alarm.

For more information, see the forum topic "fpsVR Q&A"
game_info.description: Monitor and optimize your VR performance in this simulation game! Navigate through a virtual space while managing system resources. Keep your FPS high, prevent frame drops, and maintain optimal CPU/GPU performance. Complete performance challenges, manage cable twisting, and optimize settings to achieve the best VR experience possible. Survive increasingly demanding scenarios while keeping your system running smoothly.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your VR headset position in the virtual space
Space: Toggle Performance Boost mode (temporarily improve metrics but generates heat)
Shift: Activate Cable Untwist (costs energy, reduces cable twist)
Z: Reset Statistics / Quick Optimize (cooldown applies)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic movement and navigation mechanics. Verify that the player can move in all directions and that position updates correctly in the game state.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Execute a systematic movement pattern covering all four directions. Move in a square pattern to test all arrow keys. Verify position changes are reflected in player_info logs.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player position should update smoothly. All four directional inputs should work. Movement should be bounded within the play area. No errors or position glitches should occur.

TEST_1.expected: Player position should update smoothly. All four directional inputs should work. Movement should be bounded within the play area. No errors or position glitches should occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Test the win condition by maintaining optimal performance metrics throughout multiple challenges. This validates the core gameplay loop and victory conditions.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Strategically use Performance Boost when FPS drops below target. Manage cable twist by using untwist ability when twist exceeds safe levels. Optimize movement to avoid performance-heavy zones. Balance resource usage to complete all performance challenges.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete all performance challenges. Maintain FPS above critical levels. Keep system temperatures under control. Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state. Final score should reflect efficient resource management.

TEST_2.expected: Successfully complete all performance challenges. Maintain FPS above critical levels. Keep system temperatures under control. Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state. Final score should reflect efficient resource management.

TEST_3.test_description: Test resource management and ability cooldown systems. Verify that abilities have proper costs and limitations to prevent exploitation.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Spam all abilities (Space, Shift, Z) repeatedly to test cooldown enforcement. Monitor energy depletion and regeneration. Verify that abilities cannot be used when resources are insufficient.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Abilities should respect cooldown timers. Energy should deplete with usage and regenerate over time. System should prevent ability spam. Player should experience resource constraints that require strategic planning.

TEST_3.expected: Abilities should respect cooldown timers. Energy should deplete with usage and regenerate over time. System should prevent ability spam. Player should experience resource constraints that require strategic planning.

TEST_4.test_description: Test losing conditions and game over mechanics. Verify that performance degradation leads to appropriate failure states.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Deliberately stay in high-demand areas without using Performance Boost. Allow FPS to drop critically low. Let cable twist accumulate without using untwist. Ignore temperature warnings.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Game should transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE when critical thresholds are exceeded. Appropriate failure message should display. Statistics should be saved. Restart functionality should work correctly.

TEST_4.expected: Game should transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE when critical thresholds are exceeded. Appropriate failure message should display. Statistics should be saved. Restart functionality should work correctly.

TEST_5.test_description: Test challenge progression and difficulty scaling. Verify that challenges become more demanding and spawn at appropriate intervals.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Play through multiple challenges while tracking difficulty parameters. Monitor spawn timing and requirements. Observe how performance demands increase with each completed challenge.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Challenges should appear at regular intervals. Difficulty should scale appropriately. Later challenges should require better resource management. Progression should feel balanced and achievable.
